goals.short_name: Every British Columbian has access to public health coverage and primary care

main_services.name: Enrol in public health and drug coverage
Find a family doctor or primary care

goals.short_name: British Columbians get help paying for medications, medical supplies and care

main_services.name: Get help paying for prescription drugs and medical supplies
Get help with fertility treatment costs
Get help with the cost of medical travel and accommodation

goals.short_name: British Columbians get mental health, substance use and public health protection

main_services.name: Get mental health and substance use support
Resolve a concern about health care

goals.short_name: British Columbians get supportive care as they age and access life event records

main_services.name: Get home, community or residential care
Register a birth, death, marriage or name change

acts.summary: Establishes the Medical Services Plan, sets out enrolment and eligibility for public health insurance, and prohibits extra billing for insured services. Citation confirmed via CanLII and the BC Laws consolidation, and cited directly in the disclaimer of the Ministry of Health's MSP page.

sections.title: Enrolment in the Medical Services Plan
sections.description: Requires B.C. residents to enrol in the Medical Services Plan and sets eligibility rules.

services.name: Enrol in the Medical Services Plan (MSP)
services.ms_name: Enrol in public health and drug coverage

sections.title: Prohibition on extra billing
sections.description: Prohibits practitioners from charging patients extra fees for MSP-insured services, with a review process for complaints.

services.name: Request a review of extra billing for an MSP insured service
services.ms_name: Resolve a concern about health care

acts.summary: Governs public insurance for hospital services in B.C., alongside the Medicare Protection Act. Cited directly in the disclaimer of the Ministry of Health's MSP page; citation corroborated via CanLII.

sections.title: Insured hospital services
sections.description: Sets out hospital services insured under the province's public health insurance system.

services.name: Enrol in the Medical Services Plan (MSP)
services.ms_name: Enrol in public health and drug coverage

acts.summary: Provides the legal authority for BC PharmaCare's drug benefit plans, including Fair PharmaCare. Citation corroborated via CanLII and the BC Laws consolidation.

sections.title: PharmaCare plans and drug benefits
sections.description: Authorizes PharmaCare's drug benefit plans, including income-based Fair PharmaCare coverage.

services.name: Register for the Fair PharmaCare plan
services.ms_name: Enrol in public health and drug coverage

services.name: Get help paying for prescription drugs and medical supplies through BC PharmaCare
services.ms_name: Get help paying for prescription drugs and medical supplies

acts.summary: Modernized public health legislation covering communicable disease control, immunization and the powers of medical health officers; replaced RSBC 1996, c 389 and c 475. Citation corroborated via CanLII and the BC Laws consolidation.

sections.title: Communicable disease prevention and immunization
sections.description: Provides authority for immunization programs and communicable disease control measures.

services.name: Get immunized against measles, flu, COVID-19 and other diseases

acts.summary: Governs registration of births, deaths, marriages and changes of name in B.C., administered by the Vital Statistics Agency. Citation corroborated via CanLII and the BC Laws consolidation.

sections.title: Registration of births
sections.description: Requires registration of every birth in B.C.

services.name: Register your newborn's birth
services.ms_name: Register a birth, death, marriage or name change

sections.title: Certificates and certified copies
sections.description: Authorizes the Vital Statistics Agency to issue certificates and certified copies of registered events.

services.name: Order a birth, death or marriage certificate
services.ms_name: Register a birth, death, marriage or name change

sections.title: Change of name
sections.description: Sets out the process for legally changing a name in B.C.

services.name: Apply for a legal change of name
services.ms_name: Register a birth, death, marriage or name change

sections.title: Registration of deaths
sections.description: Requires registration of every death in B.C.

services.name: Register a death
services.ms_name: Register a birth, death, marriage or name change

acts.full_name: Community Care and Assisted Living Act
acts.summary: Governs the Assisted Living Registry and licensing of community care and residential care facilities in B.C.; replaced RSBC 1996, c 60. Citation corroborated via CanLII and the BC Laws consolidation.

sections.title: Assisted living registry
sections.description: Establishes the Assisted Living Registry's role in registering assisted living residences and investigating complaints.

services.name: Find assisted living or residential care
services.ms_name: Get home, community or residential care

services.name: File a complaint about an assisted living residence
services.ms_name: Resolve a concern about health care

sections.title: Residential care facility licensing
sections.description: Provides for licensing and complaint investigation for community care and residential care facilities.

services.name: File a complaint about a residential care facility
services.ms_name: Resolve a concern about health care

acts.summary: Provides the legislative basis for publicly subsidized home support, home care and community care services delivered through B.C.'s health authorities. Citation confirmed via the BC Laws consolidation.

sections.title: Home and community care services
sections.description: Authorizes subsidized home support and community care services for eligible residents.

services.name: Apply for subsidized home and community care services
services.ms_name: Get home, community or residential care

acts.summary: Establishes B.C.'s emergency health services system, including the Emergency Medical Assistants Licensing Board. Cited directly on the Ministry of Health's health care complaints page; citation corroborated via CanLII.

sections.title: Emergency Medical Assistants Licensing Board
sections.description: Empowers the Emergency Medical Assistants Licensing Board to investigate complaints about emergency medical assistant practice.

services.name: File a complaint about an emergency medical assistant
services.ms_name: Resolve a concern about health care
